imap_status.next_mandatory_sweep: Tuesday 2026-05-19 — MANDATORY before each Day-7 send. Per lead, not bulk.

batch_5_reply_status.day3_bump_effect: Day-3 bumps assumed sent today. These significantly increase the probability of a reply in the next 24-72 hours. Monitor inbox Saturday-Monday.
batch_5_reply_status.expected_interested_count: 2-3 leads at 15% SSL-PAS rate on 12-18 sends

signal_assignment_note: No new lead data today. Waterfall unchanged: ssl → PAS (60%), mobile → PAS (20%), no_website 4★+ 20+ reviews → BAB (15%), 4.5★+ 100+ reviews → AIDA (5%).

sequence.notes: 200-char hard limit. Post-reference preferred — check profile for posts from last 60 days FIRST. Do NOT reference email, SSL, website, or audit finding. 1+ hour gap between any residual Day-3 bumps and LinkedIn.
One entry per Batch 5 lead searched. Required for BRAIN Day-7 personalisation. Must be written same session as LinkedIn execution. No exceptions.

48 days overdue. Log: all Batch 5 Day-0 sends (date, lead IDs, business names), fu_041-045 outcomes, archive decisions (leads 1/3/22, 49/51/53/54), IMAP sweep results, Day-3 bumps, LinkedIn outcomes. Must be done before Tuesday 2026-05-19 Day-7 sends.

sequence.action: IMAP sweep — each Batch 5 lead before their individual Day-7 send
sequence.notes: Per lead, not bulk sweep. If INTERESTED reply found: send interested variant, classify, 24h proposal SLA. If NOT_INTERESTED: cancel Day-7 send permanently, block all channels. If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress 24h, GDPR Article 21.

sequence.action: Day-7 new-angle email sends — all Batch 5 leads (IMAP clean)
sequence.notes: New standalone email — NOT a thread reply. New subject line. Different pain point from Day-0. See daily_email_plan.json for per-signal copy and subject lines.

Any Batch 5 lead where LinkedIn connection request has NOT been sent by EOD Tuesday: archive immediately as LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Log CHANGELOG same session. No extensions, no deferrals. 48-session warm pipeline failure does not repeat.
